sentences.target: J'habitue le chiot au bruit de la rue.
sentences.reading: /ʒa.bi.ty lə ʃjo o bʁɥi də la ʁy/

translations.fr: J'habitue le chiot au bruit de la rue.
translations.ipa: /ʒa.bi.ty lə ʃjo o bʁɥi də la ʁy/
translations.en: I’m getting the puppy used to street noise.
translations.es: Estoy acostumbrando al cachorro al ruido de la calle.
translations.de: Ich gewöhne den Welpen an den Straßenlärm.
translations.it: Sto abituando il cucciolo al rumore della strada.
translations.ko: 강아지를 거리 소음에 익숙하게 하고 있어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 我正在让小狗适应街上的噪音。
translations.yue: 我喺度令隻狗仔習慣街上嘅噪音。
translations.ru: Я приучаю щенка к шуму улицы.
translations.pt: Estou acostumando o filhote ao barulho da rua.
translations.he: אני מרגיל את הגור לרעש הרחוב.
translations.vi: Tôi đang tập cho cún con quen với tiếng ồn ngoài đường.
translations.nl: Ik laat de pup wennen aan het straatlawaai.
translations.uk: Я привчаю цуценя до вуличного шуму.
translations.hu: Hozzászoktatom a kiskutyát az utcai zajhoz.
translations.hi: मैं पिल्ले को सड़क के शोर का आदी बना रहा हूँ.
translations.el: Συνηθίζω το κουτάβι στον θόρυβο του δρόμου.
translations.id: Saya sedang membiasakan anak anjing dengan kebisingan jalan.
translations.ro: Îl obișnuiesc pe cățel cu zgomotul străzii.
translations.ja: 子犬を街の騒音に慣れさせています。

tokens.explanation: Clitic subject pronoun, 1st person singular, elided before a vowel-initial verb.
Main verb, present indicative, 1st person singular; transitive verb meaning ‘to accustom (someone) to (something)’.
Definite article, masculine singular, introducing the noun ‘chiot’.
Common noun, masculine singular; direct object (the entity being accustomed).
Contraction of the preposition ‘à’ and the definite article ‘le’; introduces the prepositional complement.
Common noun, masculine singular; object of the preposition ‘à’.
Preposition introducing a noun complement (‘de la rue’) modifying ‘bruit’.
Definite article, feminine singular, for the noun ‘rue’.
Common noun, feminine singular; complement of ‘de’.

sentences.target: Tu nous habitues à tes blagues du matin.
sentences.reading: /ty nu za.bi.ty a te blag dy ma.tɛ̃/

translations.fr: Tu nous habitues à tes blagues du matin.
translations.ipa: /ty nu za.bi.ty a te blag dy ma.tɛ̃/
translations.en: You’re getting us used to your morning jokes.
translations.es: Nos estás acostumbrando a tus chistes matutinos.
translations.de: Du gewöhnst uns an deine morgendlichen Witze.
translations.it: Ci stai abituando alle tue battute del mattino.
translations.ko: 너는 우리를 네 아침 농담에 익숙하게 만들고 있어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 你正在让我们习惯你早上的笑话。
translations.yue: 你而家令我哋習慣你朝早嘅笑話。
translations.ru: Ты приучаешь нас к своим утренним шуткам.
translations.pt: Você está nos acostumando às suas piadas matinais.
translations.he: אתה מרגיל אותנו לבדיחות הבוקר שלך.
translations.vi: Bạn đang làm chúng tôi quen với những trò đùa buổi sáng của bạn.
translations.nl: Je laat ons wennen aan je ochtendgrappen.
translations.uk: Ти привчаєш нас до своїх ранкових жартів.
translations.hi: तुम हमें अपने सुबह के चुटकुलों की आदत डाल रहे हो.
translations.pl: Przyzwyczajasz nas do swoich porannych żartów.
translations.el: Μας συνηθίζεις στα πρωινά σου αστεία.
translations.nb: Du venner oss til vitsene dine om morgenen.
translations.id: Kamu sedang membuat kami terbiasa dengan lelucon pagimu.
translations.sv: Du vänjer oss vid dina morgonskämt.
translations.ro: Ne obișnuiești cu glumele tale de dimineață.
translations.cs: Zvykáš nás na své ranní vtipy.
translations.da: Du vænner os til dine morgenvittigheder.
translations.ja: あなたは私たちを朝の冗談に慣れさせています。

tokens.explanation: Subject pronoun, 2nd person singular.
Clitic object pronoun, 1st person plural; direct object of ‘habitues’.
Main verb, present indicative, 2nd person singular; takes ‘quelqu’un’ as object and an ‘à’-phrase as complement.
Preposition introducing the complement specifying what one is being accustomed to.
Possessive determiner, 2nd person singular possessor; plural form agreeing with ‘blagues’.
Common noun, feminine plural; object of the preposition ‘à’.
Contraction of ‘de’ + ‘le’; introduces a noun complement (‘matin’) modifying ‘blagues’ (time-of-day).
Common noun, masculine singular; complement of ‘du’.

sentences.target: On veut habituer Lucas à manger sans écran.
sentences.reading: /ɔ̃ vø a.bi.ty.e ly.ka a mɑ̃ʒe sɑ̃ e.kʁɑ̃/

translations.fr: On veut habituer Lucas à manger sans écran.
translations.ipa: /ɔ̃ vø a.bi.ty.e ly.ka a mɑ̃ʒe sɑ̃ e.kʁɑ̃/
translations.en: We want to get Lucas used to eating without screens.
translations.es: Queremos acostumbrar a Lucas a comer sin pantallas.
translations.de: Wir wollen Lucas daran gewöhnen, ohne Bildschirme zu essen.
translations.it: Vogliamo abituare Lucas a mangiare senza schermi.
translations.ko: 우리는 루카스가 화면 없이 밥을 먹는 데 익숙해지게 하고 싶어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们想让卢卡斯习惯不看屏幕吃饭。
translations.yue: 我哋想令Lucas習慣唔睇螢幕食飯。
translations.ru: Мы хотим приучить Лукаса есть без экранов.
translations.pt: Queremos acostumar o Lucas a comer sem telas.
translations.he: אנחנו רוצים להרגיל את לוקאס לאכול בלי מסכים.
translations.tr: Lucas'ı ekran olmadan yemeye alıştırmak istiyoruz.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi muốn tập cho Lucas quen ăn mà không dùng màn hình.
translations.ar: نريد أن نُعوّد لوكاس على الأكل من دون شاشات.
translations.nl: We willen Lucas eraan laten wennen om zonder schermen te eten.
translations.uk: Ми хочемо привчити Лукаса їсти без екранів.
translations.hu: Szeretnénk Lucast hozzászoktatni a képernyők nélküli evéshez.
translations.hi: हम लुकास को बिना स्क्रीन के खाना खाने की आदत दिलाना चाहते हैं.
translations.pl: Chcemy przyzwyczaić Lucasa do jedzenia bez ekranów.
translations.el: Θέλουμε να συνηθίσουμε τον Λουκά να τρώει χωρίς οθόνες.
translations.nb: Vi vil venne Lucas til å spise uten skjermer.
translations.id: Kami ingin membiasakan Lucas untuk makan tanpa layar.
translations.sv: Vi vill vänja Lucas vid att äta utan skärmar.
translations.ro: Vrem să îl obișnuim pe Lucas să mănânce fără ecrane.
translations.cs: Chceme Lucase naučit jíst bez obrazovek.
translations.da: Vi vil vænne Lucas til at spise uden skærme.
translations.fi: Haluamme totuttaa Lucaksen syömään ilman ruutuja.
translations.ja: ルーカスを画面なしの食事に慣れさせたいです。

tokens.explanation: Subject pronoun (impersonal/colloquial ‘we’), syntactically 3rd person singular.
Main verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular; selects an infinitive complement.
Infinitive verb; complement (xcomp) of ‘veut’.
Proper noun; direct object (the person being accustomed) of ‘habituer’.
Preposition introducing the complement specifying the activity one is being accustomed to.
Infinitive verb; complement governed by ‘à’.
Preposition introducing a negative-meaning adverbial complement.
Common noun, masculine singular; object of the preposition ‘sans’.

sentences.target: Vous habituez les élèves à parler doucement.

translations.fr: Vous habituez les élèves à parler doucement.
translations.en: You’re getting the students used to speaking softly.
translations.es: Están acostumbrando a los alumnos a hablar en voz baja.
translations.de: Ihr gewöhnt die Schüler daran, leise zu sprechen.
translations.it: State abituando gli studenti a parlare a bassa voce.
translations.ko: 여러분은 학생들이 조용히 말하는 데 익숙해지도록 하고 있어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 你们正让学生习惯轻声说话。
translations.yue: 你哋而家令啲學生習慣細聲講嘢。
translations.pt: Vocês estão acostumando os alunos a falar baixo.
translations.he: אתם מרגילים את התלמידים לדבר בשקט.
translations.vi: Các bạn đang tập cho học sinh quen nói nhỏ.
translations.ar: أنتم تعوّدون الطلاب على التحدث بصوت منخفض.
translations.nl: Jullie laten de leerlingen wennen aan zacht praten.
translations.hu: Hozzászoktatjátok a diákokat a halk beszédhez.
translations.hi: आप छात्रों को धीरे बोलने की आदत डाल रहे हैं.
translations.el: Συνηθίζετε τους μαθητές να μιλούν σιγά.
translations.nb: Dere venner elevene til å snakke lavt.
translations.id: Kalian sedang membiasakan para siswa untuk berbicara pelan.
translations.sv: Ni vänjer eleverna vid att tala tyst.
translations.ro: Îi obișnuiți pe elevi să vorbească încet.
translations.da: I vænner eleverne til at tale dæmpet.
translations.ja: あなたたちは生徒を小さな声で話すことに慣れさせています.

tokens.explanation: Subject pronoun, 2nd person plural (or formal singular).
Main verb, present indicative, 2nd person plural; takes a direct object and an ‘à’-complement.
Definite article, plural, introducing ‘élèves’.
Common noun, plural; direct object of ‘habituez’.
Preposition introducing an infinitival complement indicating the activity.
Infinitive verb; complement governed by ‘à’.
Adverb of manner modifying ‘parler’.
